overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored warrior carrying a round shield walking through a snowy, mountainous landscape under a blood-red sky. The character approaches a wooden fortification, ascends its stairs, and explores the snow-covered rooftop featuring a large serpent statue and lit bonfire.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail approaching wooden fortification

agents.ego_description: armored character walking steadily through deep snow toward a wooden fortification under a red sky

entered.detail: large wooden log structure with stairs visible in the distance
deep snow covering the mountain path
scattered evergreen trees on the snowy hillside
stone pillars flanking the entrance to the fortification

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide snowy mountain path under a dark red sky. The armored character walks forward through deep snow toward a distant wooden fortification, with scattered pine trees and stone gate posts visible along the approach.

events.description: character begins ascending the wooden stairs of the fortification
reaches the top platform of the wooden structure

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden stairs of the snow-covered fortification toward the upper platform

entered.detail: log stairs leading upward to the fortification roof
low stone walls lining the stairway edges

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open snowfield to climbing the narrow wooden stairs of the fortification. The camera follows the ascent, with stone railings visible on the sides, until reaching the upper platform where a large serpent statue awaits.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered rooftop platform with serpent statue and bonfire

events.description: emerges onto open rooftop platform with panoramic view of snowy valley
approaches lit bonfire and large stone serpent statue

agents.ego_description: walking around the rooftop platform examining the serpent statue and overlooking the snowy valley below

entered.detail: large coiled serpent sculpture with raised head atop the platform
burning fire pit providing warm light on the snow-covered roof
expansive view of snow-covered pine forest and mountains below

segments.scene_description: Having reached the summit, the character explores the open rooftop platform covered in snow. A large stone serpent statue dominates the center near a lit bonfire, while the camera reveals panoramic views of the snowy forest valley and mountains stretching into the red-hued distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate snowy mountain path toward the summit of a wooden fortification under a blood-red sky. It begins with the armored character trekking through deep snow and past scattered pine trees, moving steadily toward a distant structure. As the character reaches the fortification, the camera follows the ascent up narrow wooden stairs flanked by stone railings. The scene then opens onto a snow-covered rooftop platform, where the camera circles a large stone serpent statue and a lit bonfire. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal panoramic views of the snowy forest valley and distant mountains stretching toward the crimson horizon.
